properties.name: Coeur d'Alene Upper Pressure Zone

properties.sourceBasis: Needs an accessible public URL before this service-area record should be treated as fully sourced. City PDF citations found during research currently return 404 for some clients.
publicNotes: Working note: city records found during research identify the Industrial Standpipe with the Upper Pressure Zone, but the direct public PDF links are not currently reliable.
No accessible public pressure-zone polygon has been added yet.
Find or archive an accessible public source before expanding this into a drawable service-area boundary.
